calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Hear The Petitionfor Order Of Affirmation In Application For Italian Dual Citizenship; [Proposed] Order Filed Concurrently Herewith
Off Calendar Sep-18-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Anthony Silvestri, Esq. 415-233-2619 Petitioner in Pro Per.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER ANTHONY SILVESTRI'S Motion To Hear The Petition for Order Of Affirmation In Application For Italian Dual Citizenship.

Anthony Silvestri's unopposed "motion for order of affirmation in application for Italian dual citizenship" is granted.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)
